title: 8×8 Expands Platform with AI, Analytics, and Authentication Updates

title: Renewable energy edge positions Sarawak as emerging regional hub for data processing, AI, research
description: By DayakDaily Team KUCHING, May 6: Sarawak’s advantage in renewable energy has the potential to offer more competitive operating costs, positioning the State to emerge as a key regional hub for data processing and research. According to TVS news, this strategic edge is further reinforced as Sarawak strengthens its ambition to become a data-driven economy [...]

title: Cognizant Eyes 12,000-15,000 Job Cuts Over AI Push, Majority Likely In India
description: Cognizant plans to cut 12000 to 15000 jobs under Project Leap, mainly in India, targeting 200 to 300 million dollars savings, while Q1 revenue rose 3.9 percent in constant currency
